name: Team Kaine
subject: What happened at the VA Senate debate just now →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
In the first 10 minutes, Corey doubled down on his assertion that the serious allegations against Judge Kavanaugh are "a bunch of crap," and refused to take survivors of sexual assault seriously. ----
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a8/3e0906/71bf0d78/3e367f8a/1681251404/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND&source=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

Tim Kaine and Corey Stewart just walked off the debate stage. And Corey made it even clearer that we just cannot afford to let him anywhere near the United States Senate.

In case you missed the debate, here's what went down:
* In the first 10 minutes, Corey doubled down on his assertion that the serious allegations against Judge Kavanaugh are "a bunch of crap," and refused to take survivors of sexual assault seriously.

* Corey, as usual, attacked our immigrant communities, categorizing immigrants as dangerous and smearing Dreamers.

* And throughout the entire debate, Corey reiterated his divisive, angry plan to take Virginia back - and what he means by that is taking us _backwards._

While we can sit around and talk about how Corey should never be elected to the Senate, having the resources and grassroots donations to power us through Election Day will send the loudest, clearest message.

Can we show there's money where Team Kaine's mouth is?

**Donate here to help us reach[200 donations](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a8/3e0906/71bf0d78/3e367f89/1681251404/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+200+donations&utm_campaign=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND&source=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND") in response to what happened at the debate [tonight:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a8/3e0906/71bf0d78/3e367f88/1681251404/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+tonight&utm_campaign=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND&source=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a8/3e0906/71bf0d78/3e367f8f/1681251404/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND&source=20180926_2_FR_TEAM_post-debate-LDND")

name: Democratic Victory 2018
subject: this is bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6255/51dbcc2a/1399d99f/3ab8c09/3030437898/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Last weekend, the chair of the Pennsylvania Republican Party said that this year, "Pennsylvania will continue to be Trump country."

**_[It's going to take all of us, working together, to stop Republicans from winning in Pennsylvania again. Can you chip in $5 right now to keep Pennsylvania blue this year?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180926_fr3_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Ever since they won Pennsylvania for the first time in almost twenty years in 2016, Republicans have set their sights on unseating Bob this year. The president and VP have already both come to PA to campaign against Bob, and President Trump is planning another trip before Election Day.

When the Trump administration has left Pennsylvania families behind, Bob's fought back with both fists up to put them first. Republicans in the Senate have already tried to take away protections for pre-existing conditions, gave a tax break to the wealthiest 1% and threatened to cut funding for programs like Medicaid, Medicare and Social Security.

**We can 't afford to let Pennsylvania be Trump country. What can you give before our end-of-quarter deadline this weekend to help keep Pennsylvania blue this year?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. name: Steve Chabot
subject: PolitiFact is Anything But
body:
Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-e/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [PolitiFact is Anything But](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-j/)
President Obama famously mislead the public when he said, referring to ObamaCare," If you like your health insurance, you can keep your health insurance." PolitiFact on six different occasions determined that THIS STATEMENT WAS TRUE! When, over time, it became apparent to virtually everyone that this statement was NOT true, PolitiFact reversed its opinion, and went so far as to declare that Obama's statement was "the lie of the year" in 2013! [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-d/)
As I've mentioned in previous blog posts, one of Congressional Republicans' greatest challenges this election cycle is historical. And that's that when one party wins the presidency, the other party almost always picks up seats in the next election. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [If the Democrats Win - Get Ready for Impeachment](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-u/)
Democrats, for the most part, hate Donald Trump. There are, of course, a few exceptions. And there are a few Republicans, and a fair number of Independents, who don't care for him either. But most Democrats - they think he's gotta go. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Fact Checking the Fact Checker](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjduhlld-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Cincinnati Enquirer is supposed to be the local paper of record. The one local folks go to who still read the paper - which is evidently a smaller and smaller population every year. My wife and I still get it, but I think they're down to two families on our block that do (including us.) Click below to read more. clean_body: Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year No Images? President Obama famously mislead the public when he said, referring to ObamaCare," If you like your health insurance, you can keep your health insurance." PolitiFact on six different occasions determined that THIS STATEMENT WAS TRUE! When, over time, it became apparent to virtually everyone that this statement was NOT true, PolitiFact reversed its opinion, and went so far as to declare that Obama's statement was "the lie of the year" in 2013! Previous Weekly Posts As I've mentioned in previous blog posts, one of Congressional Republicans' greatest challenges this election cycle is historical. And that's that when one party wins the presidency, the other party almost always picks up seats in the next election. Democrats, for the most part, hate Donald Trump. There are, of course, a few exceptions. And there are a few Republicans, and a fair number of Independents, who don't care for him either. But most Democrats - they think he's gotta go. The Cincinnati Enquirer is supposed to be the local paper of record. The one local folks go to who still read the paper - which is evidently a smaller and smaller population every year. My wife and I still get it, but I think they're down to two families on our block that do (including us.) Click below to read more. word came out that John McCain had passed away over the weekend, there have been many tributes to this Arizona Senator, American war hero, and almost-President. Rather than repeat a lot of what you've probably seen or heard since then, I thought I'd touch on a number of interactions I've had with him over the years. Click below to read more. | | | ---|---|--- 2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Why I want to bring it home:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f2/9e00690/5cb8ba3c/24013d2f/305315152/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180926_BringItHome_fnd_gq_nono__ag_ettx&source=em18_180926_BringItHome_fnd_gq_nono__ag_ettx")
Friends,

If you've been a part of the campaign for a while, you already know the story. Growing up, my grandmother would tell me to go to school, to mind my teachers, to get that education and bring it home -- for my brothers and my sister, for our neighborhood, and our community.

I'm reaching out today to talk with you a little more about this, because I want you to know that when we talk about "home" on this campaign, we aren't talking about a specific place, but rather a feeling -- the confidence that you can come as you are, be welcomed, and be cared about. That's what we want to create in this movement and this state, and that's why we're going everywhere and speaking to everyone on this campaign.

**[Will you help us bring it home for Florida by making a contribution of $5 or whatever you can to help get out the vote in the final weeks of this election?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f2/9e00690/5cb8ba3c/24013d27/305315152/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-bring-it-home-0923?gpsid=17_55_3814&refcode=em18_180926_BringItHome_fnd_gq_nono__ag_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_BringItHome_fnd_gq_nono__ag_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+help+us+bring+it+home+for+Flori")**

We're working to give every Floridian the opportunity they need to succeed and live a fulfilled life, to have a "home" here -- no matter your race, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, class, age, ability, or education level, no matter if you were born here or any country in the world. We can be that kind of state, and I will be that kind of Governor.

Together, we are building the kind of campaign that the entire state can be proud of, that stands up for every Floridian, that gives opportunity to every family no matter what their background is. And together, we're going to win back the Governor's office after more than 20 long years.

**[This is our opportunity to bring it home for Florida -- I hope you'll help us make that happen.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f2/9e00690/5cb8ba3c/24013d26/305315152/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-bring-it-home-0923?gpsid=17_55_3814&refcode=em18_180926_BringItHome_fnd_gq_nono__ag_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_BringItHome_fnd_gq_nono__ag_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+This+is+our+opportunity+to+bring+it+home")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f2/9e00690/5cb8ba3c/24013d39/305315152/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-bring-it-home-0923?gpsid=17_55_3814&refcode=em18_180926_BringItHome_fnd_gq_nono__ag_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180926_BringItHome_fnd_gq_nono__ag_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36f2/9e00690/5cb8ba3c/24013d38/305315152/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=12+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180926_BringItHome_fnd_gq_nono__ag_ettx"). subject: My shortest email ever

body:
This election is really important. And it's also really close. Today, President Trump's super PAC announced they're jumping into the race with an additional $2 million to defeat me. |

I hate to ask (raising money is by far the worst part of this job), but I need your help. This election is really important. And it's also really close. Today, President Trump's super PAC announced they're jumping into the race with an additional $2 million to defeat me. We need to fight back -- hard.

**Will you pitch in? (And don 't forget -- the match is still on.) Joe |

subject: 🚨 we must stop Wendy Rogers 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
The choice in this race could not be more clear.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f1d/1a8421e1/1a5caac8a/492b0853/3872322209/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, _**We must stop Wendy Rogers**_ \-- our far-right opponent backed by DC Super PACs. **Our end-of-quarter fundraising goal is coming up on Sunday, and we have $9,411 left to raise. To defeat Rogers, we can 't fall short.** [**CHIP IN to DEFEAT Rogers and re-elect Tom >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.26_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Here is why we must work hard to defeat Rogers, team --_the choice in this race could not be more clear:_
* _Rogers has said Social Security is UNCONSTITUTIONAL and should be PHASED OUT;_ Tom stands with our seniors and will fight to protect the benefits they've earned.
* _Rogers wants to cut both Social Security AND Medicare;_ Tom will work to strengthen these critical programs.
* _Rogers has compared women 's reproductive rights to the Holocaust;_ Tom stands with Arizona women and will defend their access to health care.

We are confident that Arizona voters will reject Rogers and her far-right views in November and choose to re-elect Tom, the independent voice fighting for them in Congress. But we CANNOT take this for granted, team\-- we repeat, we CANNOT take this for granted. **Rogers has far-right Super PACs ready to boost her, so we are counting on this grassroots team to make sure we can tell voters about Tom 's record and fight back against the far-right's inevitable attacks.** And to do so, we must raise $9,411 by Sunday. [**Please, CHIP IN now to keep AZ-01 blue >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.26_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.26_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

** **

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: So much is at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/t6p3Uuz97XSIb7kpqeddwYsYCAeq3wsLtBhzuWOxlFg=/1GliYGJysjOLw-5iCltrcoxtFuNG3o0I8LS5vHSWvss=) Friends and Neighbors -- The office of Florida Chief Financial Officer (CFO) may not make many headlines, **but the great responsibilities that come with it are of great consequence to _EVERY_ Floridian.** Here are just a few examples of the things the CFO is responsible for: \- Oversees the state accounting functions \- Oversight of the state auditing functions \- Oversight of the states unclaimed properties \- Monitors the investments of state funds \- Manages the deferred compensation program \- Manages the risk management program for the state \- Oversight of the Insurance Consumer Service \- Oversight of the insurance agents and agencies and responsible for insurance licensing \- Oversight of licensing and regulations for funeral homes and cemeteries \- Oversight of insurance fraud investigation \- Ensuring businesses have workers compensation coverage \- Assisting injured workers with benefits and re-employment \- Serves as the state fire marshal Additionally, the CFO -- along with the Governor, Attorney General, and the Agriculture Commissioner -- serves on the Florida Cabinet, which has the following roles and responsibilities in our state government: \- Governing the purchase of state lands \- Serve as the state Clemency Board \- Governing the purchase of state bonds \- Fiduciary trustee for the Florida Retirement System \- Oversight of the state Veterans' Affairs \- Oversight of State Law Enforcement \- Oversight of power plants and transmission line citings \- Financial and insurance regulation for the state [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/t6p3Uuz97XSIb7kpqeddwYsYCAeq3wsLtBhzuWOxlFg=/33gwF2r3v05PORKdrGSK31bTJemLBtPBt-S-TI5dt0E=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Needless to say, the CFO has a lot to do with the direction our state government takes. They also serve as **an important check and balance to other parts of the Cabinet - including the Governor 's office, as well as the state government's interaction with the federal government.** These days, just watching the news should remind us of the great importance of checks and balances in government - and making sure our leaders are doing right by the people they were elected to serve _(you)_. We will have an important opportunity on November 6th. **And so very much is at stake.** As your next CFO,**making sure that your state government spends YOUR money wisely and transparently would be my top priority.** We have an election coming up in just six short weeks. **But we have another crucial End-of-Month fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days. ** **[Can you contribute $20.18 or more by midnight Sunday, to help me bring checks and balances to the Cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/t6p3Uuz97XSIb7kpqeddwYsYCAeq3wsLtBhzuWOxlFg=/33gwF2r3v05PORKdrGSK31bTJemLBtPBt-S-TI5dt0E=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

clean_body: | = Friends and Neighbors -- The office of Florida Chief Financial Officer (CFO) may not make many headlines, but the great responsibilities that come with it are of great consequence to EVERY Floridian. Here are just a few examples of the things the CFO is responsible for: \- Oversees the state accounting functions \- Oversight of the state auditing functions \- Oversight of the states unclaimed properties \- Monitors the investments of state funds \- Manages the deferred compensation program \- Manages the risk management program for the state \- Oversight of the Insurance Consumer Service \- Oversight of the insurance agents and agencies and responsible for insurance licensing \- Oversight of licensing and regulations for funeral homes and cemeteries \- Oversight of insurance fraud investigation \- Ensuring businesses have workers compensation coverage \- Assisting injured workers with benefits and re-employment \- Serves as the state fire marshal Additionally, the CFO -- along with the Governor, Attorney General, and the Agriculture Commissioner -- serves on the Florida Cabinet, which has the following roles and responsibilities in our state government: \- Governing the purchase of state lands \- Serve as the state Clemency Board \- Governing the purchase of state bonds \- Fiduciary trustee for the Florida Retirement System \- Oversight of the state Veterans' Affairs \- Oversight of State Law Enforcement \- Oversight of power plants and transmission line citings \- Financial and insurance regulation for the state & Needless to say, the CFO has a lot to do with the direction our state government takes. They also serve as an important check and balance to other parts of the Cabinet - including the Governor 's office, as well as the state government's interaction with the federal government. These days, just watching the news should remind us of the great importance of checks and balances in government - and making sure our leaders are doing right by the people they were elected to serve (you). We will have an important opportunity on November 6th. And so very much is at stake. As your next CFO,making sure that your state government spends YOUR money wisely and transparently would be my top priority. We have an election coming up in just six short weeks. But we have another crucial End-of-Month fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days. & Thank you for all of your support, Jeremy Ring | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer PO Box 670311 Coral Springs FL 33067 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. .

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Sign the Manhattan Declaration!
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ | Fellow Christian, As followers of Christ, no matter our denomination, we believe that God desires for his people to be a blessing to the world and a force for renewal. It was for this reason that, nearly a decade ago, the Manhattan Declaration was written to unite all Christians behind the core Biblical principles that will bring life and hope to our nation and our world. [**Today, I ask that you join thousands of your fellow believers in taking a stand by signing the Manhattan Declaration.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjcwLTRhMTMzZjEwMzk0NzQ4NGI5NmViZTMxNzdjYTE0NTVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5icmVha3BvaW50Lm9yZy9tYW5oYXR0YW5kZWNsYXJhdGlvbi8&K=XIZ5tyf_Fb_Hx_zb-bvAQA) | [**Sign the Manhattan Declaration >>**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjcwLTRhMTMzZjEwMzk0NzQ4NGI5NmViZTMxNzdjYTE0NTVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5icmVha3BvaW50Lm9yZy9tYW5oYXR0YW5kZWNsYXJhdGlvbi8&K=tjt81X0zcQ4QPnIPChULsA)
---
In doing so, you are affirming the sanctity of every human life.
You are standing up for the belief in marriage as an institution between one man and one woman.
And you are professing your commitment to the inherent right of religious freedom for all.
If you agree, I hope you'll take just a moment of your time to [**sign the Manhattan Declaration today.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjcwLTRhMTMzZjEwMzk0NzQ4NGI5NmViZTMxNzdjYTE0NTVk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5icmVha3BvaW50Lm9yZy9tYW5oYXR0YW5kZWNsYXJhdGlvbi8&K=BBtBvx5SO7sH5QzBknCZdQ)
Faithfully yours,
John Stonestreet
President
The Colson Center for Christian Worldview

The Colson Center for Christian Worldview
PO Box 50396 | Colorado Springs, CO 80949

107 S. West Street • #115 • Alexandria VA, 22314

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: How Trump Rescued Our Economy From Obama’s ‘New Normal’
body:
| |
---
# _How Trump Rescued Our Economy From Obama’s ‘New Normal’_
“It’s hard to believe that just two short years ago, our economy was limping along with no sign of a massive boom around the corner. Beyond any shadow of a doubt, the pivotal factor in the last two years has been President Donald Trump,” Michael Busler writes in _The Daily Signal_. Growth under President Trump has “driven down underemployment, increased the proportion of Americans in the labor force, increased the number of part-time employees finding full-time work, boosted wages, and reduced the unemployment rate overall. This all will lead to ever higher incomes for families. The real median income is set to hit a record level by the end of 2018.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDQwNTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ0MDUyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/09/26/how-trump-rescued-our-economy-from-obamas-new-normal/) “President Trump and Japan Foreign Minister Shinzo Abe agreed Wednesday to negotiate a new trade deal between the two countries. A centerpiece of the proposed deal would be increased U.S. car sales in Japan and Japanese agriculture sales in the U.S.,” S.A. Miller writes in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDQwNTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ0MDUyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/sep/26/trump-japan-pm-shinzo-abe-agree-redo-trade-deal/). “It can only be better for the United States. It couldn’t get any worse than what has happened over the years,” the President said. “Over the first two years of his administration, President Trump has prioritized policies that promote American competitiveness and U.S. interests in trade deals as well as focus on lowering the cost of healthcare and the price of medicines,” Grover Norquist and Alex Hendrie write in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDQwNTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ0MDUyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/trade-deals-arent-just-for-manufacturing-they-can-lower-drug-prices-too). “Just 100 days since the administration rolled out their drug pricing plan, at least 15 manufacturers have committed to lowering drug prices. In this time period, there have been 60 percent fewer price increases, and 54 percent more price decreases.” In [**Fox News**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDQwNTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ0MDUyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&http://www.foxnews.com/opinion/2018/09/26/rep-jim-renacci-trump-s-tax-cuts-worked-don-t-let-dc-establishment-take-them-away.html), Rep. Jim Renacci (R-OH) writes that it is abundantly clear that President Trump’s tax cuts are working. “The U.S. is the largest economy in the world and is getting stronger every day thanks to the leadership of President Trump,” Rep. Renacci concludes. “First Lady Melania Trump announced she’ll be visiting four ‘beautiful and very different’ countries when she travels to Africa next month on her first major solo trip abroad,” Caitlin Yilek reports in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDQwNTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ0MDUyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/melania-trump-reveals-which-countries-shell-visit-on-africa-trip). “This will be my first time traveling to Africa and I am excited to educate myself on the issues facing children throughout the continent, while also learning about its rich culture and history,” the First Lady said.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDQwNTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ0MDUyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDQwNTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ0MDUyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDQwNTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ0MDUyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNDE2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
---

name: Josh Mahony
subject: The Home Stretch
body:
Friend,
It's been a long campaign and this has been a race that I have been proud to run. As we get closer to election day and voters begin to make up their minds on who to vote for, it is important that we continue to fuel this campaign down the home stretch.
In the closing weeks my team is putting together the program to get us across the finish line in first place. This includes our paid media, our direct mail and our GOTV efforts. Our campaign has never been able to match Steve Womack dollar for dollar, because I won't accept money from special interests or corporate PAC's. I have counted on you and every time I have asked, you have delivered.
_**I need you to stick with us as we close out this campaign strong. I'm asking you to make another contribution today to keep up our momentum and to carry us forward to election day. I need you now more than ever before. Make a contribution today.**_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2354815/12997561/-1826915792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjhmOTFmZC01ZGMyLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QEyvzIPrK8ole989N8Zedfvcm2blX6DGlRmU--DUn_4=)
Josh

name: Elise
subject: This is it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
This is it.

Sunday is our **final end-of-quarter deadline** before the election, and as Amy works for us this week in Washington, we need to have her back. A strong showing on this filing will demonstrate to everyone that we're ready for the homestretch!

We've had a lot going on in these last few weeks: **we launched new TV ads, continued door-knocking all over the state, and Minnesotans started voting!**

**Team Klobuchar is in all 87 Minnesota counties,** and as Finance Director I'm doing everything I can to make sure they have the resources to knock on as many doors and make as many phone calls as possible before Election Day.

**But I can 't do it without your help. We need to hit our goal of $75,000 by Sunday's midnight deadline to stay on track. Will you make a donation to help us reach our final end-of-quarter goal before Election Day?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Tim Walz
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---
Friend,

When my father passed away, Social Security survivor benefits helped my family get back on our feet. And after I served in the Army, I got a good education thanks to the GI Bill. I know that government can do real good for people -- I've experienced it.

But right now Republican extremists are dead set on pushing through policies that will make success stories like mine all but impossible. They're gutting education, eliminating regulations that protect consumers and our environment, and robbing our most vulnerable citizens of their health care -- all to pay for tax cuts for their wealthy corporate backers.

**I 'm running a campaign that talks about what we can accomplish when we work together. [Will you sign on today to support Peggy and me and help us create a better future for One Minnesota? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/odeL28Cy3D12LJd-Qm85yA1wOONTZlm_B8l4zkQ4z0s=/XoP7cyYDP5xLAjPkHB0PbJMxiohadE-zARMVFLTqauc=)**

Some of my constituents as a Congressman -- including many Republicans -- tell me they voted for me because they know that I'm as dedicated a public servant as I was a teacher. Because of that community-first approach, I've been elected in places where people didn't think a progressive Democrat could win. I'll use that experience to bridge the urban-rural divide that's turned so much of the debate at the State Capitol into a contest between the Twin Cities and Greater Minnesota.

This election will have great consequences for our state. It's about whether we will commit ourselves to good jobs, good education, and good health care for all Minnesotans, or allow our wages to be driven down, regulations lifted, and the cost of health care sent skyrocketing by legislation pushed by special interests.

**Will you join the Walz Flanagan team? This campaign will be driven by grassroots supporters -- it will be driven by you, friend.**
| [**Follow us on Facebook**](https://act.myngp.com/el/odeL28Cy3D12LJd-Qm85yA1wOONTZlm_B8l4zkQ4z0s=/ctXV9I_AJJAUSUeoCvqHDHme4mQdAnOmG2YuSkdI-CA=)
---
| [**Keep in touch on Twitter**](https://act.myngp.com/el/odeL28Cy3D12LJd-Qm85yA1wOONTZlm_B8l4zkQ4z0s=/k42ke1F6jcZUW-CYc5YH1V_wRJGXaDZ9sAkQGYbGMe0=)
---

Thank you,

Tim

P.S. The Minnesota Political Contribution Program will refund individuals $50 total and married couples $100 total when residents contribute to statewide candidates. Once you donate, we will send you a receipt and a form to claim your refund.

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/odeL28Cy3D12LJd-Qm85yA1wOONTZlm_B8l4zkQ4z0s=/9bNC3lgdKrtFn5EOAB9dJCdnh69_2KjYbYnI3_snD_8=?refcode=welcome2018&amount=25)

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: 200,000 Nevadans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9nGMqNHT9FcWlCkOLMsxbNwYvBGJ8okVacDi3Ei9NAk=/J1-EjRuU1IHZYhuRB2sWP9H4FL0GIHllYqhXP7_eIyg=?gpsid=37_57_3923&refcode=em18_180927_EOQ4ad_LG_fnd_gq_act__SS&utm_campaign=em18_180927_EOQ4ad_LG_fnd_gq_act__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)

Dear Friend,

When Governor Sandoval did the right thing and voted to expand Medicaid, 200,000 Nevadans got health care, and could finally go to the doctor. But Adam Laxalt opposed Sandoval -- and opposed expanding Medicaid.

Special interests are hiding the truth and trying to make Laxalt's record on health care something it's not. That's why I'm launching a new TV ad today to set the record straight.

**[Nevada's next governor should make health care more -- not less -- affordable. And that's exactly what I'll do if I'm elected. Please watch our new ad that shares this message, then chip in $5 to help buy TV spots before our end-of-quarter deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9nGMqNHT9FcWlCkOLMsxbNwYvBGJ8okVacDi3Ei9NAk=/J1-EjRuU1IHZYhuRB2sWP9H4FL0GIHllYqhXP7_eIyg=?gpsid=37_57_3923&refcode=em18_180927_EOQ4ad_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS&utm_campaign=em18_180927_EOQ4ad_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)**

Steve

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m asking you to help Jessica Morse today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LBrMZn3xqXlW1McOY2PC_3yMksZRYSD_akiheenY6R8=/0rk6FgX01VZEcrP-HxkPWCKGVXX-X3tpXLGdg1nWoTc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180927_EW_20180927-eoqwarren_all_logo)
Team, I'm more committed than ever to electing Jessica Morse to represent California's 4th District. She's fighting for exactly what our country needs right now: accessible, high-quality health care and an economy that benefits everyday Americans. Jessica's pledged not to take corporate PAC money because she is going to fight for you--not the special interests.
**Her team is also facing the final FEC quarterly filing deadline before the general election, and they 're still $18,750 short of their goal.** Jessica needs every single one of us to step up right now if she's going to win in November.
**Look --this race matters so much to me, I'm reaching out one more time: Can you chip in before Sunday's deadline to help Jessica hit her goal and have the resources she needs to win in November? **
[$5 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/LBrMZn3xqXlW1McOY2PC_3yMksZRYSD_akiheenY6R8=/0rk6FgX01VZEcrP-HxkPWCKGVXX-X3tpXLGdg1nWoTc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180927_EW_20180927-eoqwarren_all_5&amount=5) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/LBrMZn3xqXlW1McOY2PC_3yMksZRYSD_akiheenY6R8=/0rk6FgX01VZEcrP-HxkPWCKGVXX-X3tpXLGdg1nWoTc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180927_EW_20180927-eoqwarren_all_25&amount=25)

[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/LBrMZn3xqXlW1McOY2PC_3yMksZRYSD_akiheenY6R8=/0rk6FgX01VZEcrP-HxkPWCKGVXX-X3tpXLGdg1nWoTc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180927_EW_20180927-eoqwarren_all_250&amount=250) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/LBrMZn3xqXlW1McOY2PC_3yMksZRYSD_akiheenY6R8=/0rk6FgX01VZEcrP-HxkPWCKGVXX-X3tpXLGdg1nWoTc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180927_EW_20180927-eoqwarren_all_other)
Last winter, Jessica's opponent voted to give special interests a trillion-dollar tax cut, blowing a hole in the budget that he wants to fill by cutting Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. He's also voted to strip health care from millions of Americans of all ages--including hundreds of thousands of his own constituents with pre-existing conditions.
**Working families across California and across our nation can 't afford leadership like that.** Fighting back starts with electing independent leaders and true public servants like Jessica Morse to Congress--leaders who'll prioritize everyday people.
They will do absolutely all they can to keep seats like this one--we're seeing that play out across the country. The best way to make sure Jessica can fight back is to help her team hit this critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal before Sunday's deadline.
[_**Can you chip in $25 or more now to help the team pull it off?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/LBrMZn3xqXlW1McOY2PC_3yMksZRYSD_akiheenY6R8=/_p5J-EbRB6YCWEztq2YCYmo5w7VrPSQMs2Ho1aCbTok=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180927_EW_20180927-eoqwarren_all_l1&amount=25)
Thank you,
Elizabeth Warren

name: Jason Yates
subject: Have you noticed?
body:
Peter,
On Saturday Vice President Pence warned faith voters to stand guard against complacency in the midterm elections.
Have you noticed? The secular liberal left is mobilizing their base in unbelievable numbers.
**_Pence said, “But I say we must match – in fact, I say we must surpass – the energy of the American left and their enthusiasm and passion. Let’s keep faith that He who has ever watched over this nation still governs in the affairs of men_."**
The Women’s March organization is uniting its base around one core issue—abortion.
And religious liberty continues to be under attack in communities across the country most recently in Austin where LGBTQ Activists are trying to prohibit the Austin Independent School District from renting it’s facilities to a church on Sundays because of the church’s stance on marriage.
It’s never been more important than it is now for Christians to take notice of what’s happening in our country and prepare to stand for the biblical values of life and religious liberty this November.
We can’t rest. The elections are right around the corner.
[Will you please donate your best gift today to My Faith Votes to help us mobilize more like-minded Christians across the country?](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180927apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180927apl01nd&n=1)
We can’t do this without you. Thank you for taking notice and for uniting with us in prayer and with your contributions.
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180927apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180927apl01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180927apl01nd&n=3)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180927apl01nd&n=4).

body:
It's easy to get distracted by our opponent. Just last night at our most recent debate he doubled down on his assertion that the serious allegations against Judge Kavanaugh are "a bunch of crap." ----
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | [**Updated Goal: $50,000 more to raise before midnight September 30th, 2018.**

These funds raised in September will go towards:
\-- A "Get Out the Vote" effort coordinated across all Virginia Democratic candidates, in all eleven House districts
\-- Materials to help inform voters on how, when, and where to vote on November 6th.

Fundraising numbers from September released publicly in October will play a major role in how experts predict the outcome of races in November - and where Republicans decide to further invest (_or not_).

Derek, we have just three more days to meet our goal and set every Democratic candidate in Virginia up for success for the next one month and six days. **Can you make a donation today to our _final_ quarterly goal?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ab/3e0906/718e8d4a/3e3670c1/558227432/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180927_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-goal-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Updated+Goal+50000+more+to+raise+before+&utm_campaign=20180927_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-goal-LDND&source=20180927_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-goal-LDND")

Derek, since the June primary election, Tim has been campaigning for the whole Democratic ticket in Virginia. And every fundraising milestone we hit indicates the strength of this program and our ability to compete _everywhere_ on [November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ab/3e0906/718e8d4a/3e3670c7/558227432/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180927_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-goal-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180927_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-goal-LDND&source=20180927_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-goal-LDND")

Each donation made here goes directly to our on-the-ground efforts to talk to voters across the Commonwealth and do our part in electing what could be a new Democratic majority in the House. This year Virginia has some of the most flippable House districts _in the entire country._ What's more, Tim's Senate race - _because of who our opponent is and what he has said he believes in_ \- is a referendum on our values as a Commonwealth. _So there 's a lot of pressure on the team in Virginia to run a winning program._

We're now halfway through this major milestone of $100,000 in the last week of September, and we have just three days left to get it done. Tim is depending on us to hit this goal - and so are the rest of our candidates in Virginia. **Will you help us cross this finish line as we sprint for $50,000 more in the next three days?**

Derek, it's easy to get distracted by our opponent Corey Stewart and the sensationalist, often mean-spirited claims he makes. Just last night at our most recent debate he doubled down on his assertion that the serious allegations against Judge Kavanaugh are "a bunch of crap," and refused to take survivors of sexual assault seriously.

But we're always looking at the big picture. Electing Democrats at all levels is the most important investment we can make for our future, and it's the best way to ensure that not only is Corey Stewart never a U.S. Senator, but that we close the door on his backwards values for good.

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Final-Quarterly-Public-Deadline](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ab/3e0906/718e8d4a/3e3670d8/558227432/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180927_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-goal-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFinalQuarterlyPubl&utm_campaign=20180927_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-goal-LDND&source=20180927_1_FR_TEAM_EOQ-goal-LDND")

Let's go win as a team in November.

clean_body: It's easy to get distracted by our opponent. Just last night at our most recent debate he doubled down on his assertion that the serious allegations against Judge Kavanaugh are "a bunch of crap." ---- | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | "" | "" Derek, since the June primary election, Tim has been campaigning for the whole Democratic ticket in Virginia. And every fundraising milestone we hit indicates the strength of this program and our ability to compete everywhere on "" Each donation made here goes directly to our on-the-ground efforts to talk to voters across the Commonwealth and do our part in electing what could be a new Democratic majority in the House. This year Virginia has some of the most flippable House districts in the entire country. What's more, Tim's Senate race - because of who our opponent is and what he has said he believes in \- is a referendum on our values as a Commonwealth. So there 's a lot of pressure on the team in Virginia to run a winning program. We're now halfway through this major milestone of $100,000 in the last week of September, and we have just three days left to get it done. Tim is depending on us to hit this goal - and so are the rest of our candidates in Virginia. Will you help us cross this finish line as we sprint for $50,000 more in the next three days? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Derek, it's easy to get distracted by our opponent Corey Stewart and the sensationalist, often mean-spirited claims he makes. Just last night at our most recent debate he doubled down on his assertion that the serious allegations against Judge Kavanaugh are "a bunch of crap," and refused to take survivors of sexual assault seriously. But we're always looking at the big picture. Electing Democrats at all levels is the most important investment we can make for our future, and it's the best way to ensure that not only is Corey Stewart never a U.S. Senator, but that we close the door on his backwards values for good. "" Let's go win as a team in November. "" * | "" "" ""

name: Jared Page
subject: Urgent Campaign Update
body:
| Friend,

Today, new West Virginia U.S. Senate race polling conducted by _1892 Polling_ shows the race between Attorney General Morrisey and Senator Manchin is [tied](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=8b990df9dd&e=194b9bf87e) ahead of President Trump's visit to the state on Saturday.

As [reported](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=274613dfdd&e=194b9bf87e) in _The Hill_ this morning, _1892 Polling_ found that the Senate race between Manchin and Morrisey is tied at 45 percent, with 10 percent of voters still undecided. Morrisey maintains a 4-point lead among independent voters. President Trump remains incredibly popular in the state with 57 percent of voters viewing him favorably, while only 38 percent viewing him unfavorably.
---
|
---
| In polling conducted after President Trump's August visit to West Virginia, Harper Polling noticed a significant "Trump bump" for Morrisey. Trump's involvement in the West Virginia Senate race will continue this weekend with a rally in Wheeling for Morrisey. President Trump's engagement in the West Virginia Senate race continues to have a more significant impact here in the Mountain State than in any U.S. Senate race in the country.

Read _The Hill 's_ write up of the poll [here](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=53a7006667&e=194b9bf87e).
---

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: Bending the moral arc
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Why I believe in Ben:

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378314/7ab0e2c4/7e31faab/3498cb87/3474381828/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09278A") Friend, It's despicable to see our country being run by the wealthy, _for_ the wealthy. That's why I fight so hard here in New York City for greater economic equality -- because I know D.C. won't. That's why I support my friend Ben Jealous, too. Ben has spent his life bending the moral arc toward justice, and I know he'll stand proudly in defiance against Donald Trump's divisive agenda. But even more importantly, he has a plan to create fairness and lift up all people -- strengthening Maryland for years to come. [**I'm proud to support my fellow progressive Ben Jealous, but he needs your help now -- he has an aggressive goal of filling a GOTV fund with $25,000 in grassroots donations. Donate $5 or more today to fund the fight for a cleaner, greener, and stronger Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378314/7ab0e2c4/7e31faab/3498cb87/3474381828/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09278A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378314/7ab0e2c4/7e31faab/3498cb86/3474381828/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09278A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378314/7ab0e2c4/7e31faab/3498cb83/3474381828/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09278A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378314/7ab0e2c4/7e31faab/3498cb82/3474381828/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09278A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378314/7ab0e2c4/7e31faab/3498cb8d/3474381828/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09278A&express_lane=true")
---
Ben is exactly the kind of candidate who will help us turn the tide this November. Electing him would prove that the conventional wisdom is wrong: Democrats don't have to compromise their principles to win. In fact, when we are bold, like Ben, we are _more_ likely to win.
He has what it takes to not only win this election, but to govern a large and diverse state like Maryland. Ben is proof positive that progressive values are winning values, and that progressive values are helping propel us forward. Ben's plans to bring Medicare-for-All, clean energy, and a stronger, more equal economy are exactly what Democrats should be running on everywhere, in every state, city, and county across America.
But he's up against a well-funded Republican incumbent who is trying to make people afraid of that. That's why Ben's going to need all of us to step up and help out:
[**As a fellow progressive, can I count on you today? Help fill Ben's GOTV fund by donating $5 or more now. Let's help make history in Maryland and make a big bend in that arc of the moral universe.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378314/7ab0e2c4/7e31faab/3498cb87/3474381828/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sept-eoq?refcode=OHQ09278A")
Thanks,
Bill de Blasio
Mayor of New York City

---

name: Cynthia Cano, betofortexas.com
subject: Beto’s Whataburger order:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I spend about 90% of my time on the road with Beto these days, traveling
from county to county, helping make sure every event we host goes off
without a hitch. I’ve got a quick story to share with you from this past
weekend -- but before I get into it, I need to ask:

[20]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180927&t=1019&akid=13393%2E444211%2EF3sbha ]We’re up against our biggest -- and final -- end-of-quarter
fundraising goal of this campaign. Whether we fall short will determine
our plan to win in November. Can you step up with a
donation of
$3
to make sure we reach this goal for Beto?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180927&t=1020&akid=13393%2E444211%2EF3sbha ]Contribute
$3
»

You get to see a lot on the road. Last Friday night -- after Beto won his
first debate against Ted Cruz -- we were supposed to fly from Dallas to
San Antonio to hit the campaign trail with Julián and Joaquin Castro in
Laredo and the Rio Grande Valley.

But because the weather was so bad on Friday, our flight got delayed --
but Beto didn’t want to miss any of our events in the coming days. So we
made a game-time decision: Beto drove us to a Whataburger, grabbed some
food to go (a #1 with cheese, no tomato, with a Coke) and we hit the road
to San Antonio.

(Maybe you saw the video of Beto playing air drums to “Baba O’Riley” by
The Who in that Whataburger drive-through line.)

[23]Beto for Texas

After a hard day’s work, Beto could have easily booked a hotel in Dallas
and caught a later flight the next day, postponing the events in Laredo
and the Rio Grande Valley. Our supporters and volunteers would have
probably been disappointed but understanding.

But Beto puts people first. In as many years as I’ve known him, I know
just how selfless he is -- and that’s how he’s running his campaign. Beto
is tireless, and he’s been working his heart out for the people of Texas
since day 1.

And with just 40 days to go until the election, I’m calling on each of us
to be as tireless as Beto.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180927&t=1021&akid=13393%2E444211%2EF3sbha ]Stand with Beto today. Give a
donation of
$3
or more to Beto’s campaign -- powered 100% by people, not PACs -- to make
sure we have the resources we need to keep Beto on the road, listening to
Texans across the state.

I’m so inspired and humbled by each of you and all you’ve done to elect
Beto. I just know all of our hard work is going to pay off in a few short
weeks.

Thanks,

Cynthia Cano
Deputy Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180927&t=1022&akid=13393%2E444211%2EF3sbha ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180927footer&t=1023&akid=13393%2E444211%2EF3sbha

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=13393%2E444211%2EF3sbha

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: "" "" ** "" "" "" This isn 't a joke, team. This is Martin's MOST IMPORTANT deadline this year. Reaching this FEC goal would send the strongest possible message before the midterms that Martin will win his first Senate reelection campaign. With Martin's opponents (including Gary Johnson), the media, and dark-money groups like the Kochs awaiting Martin's final quarterly FEC report, we can't risk missing our budget goals. "" If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks for all you do! Lindsey Miller Deputy Campaign Manager, Martin Heinrich for Senate | PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends! Receive this email from a friend? "" Make sure to follow the campaign on "" and "" If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next, ""** We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click "". Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Martin Sheen
subject: A note from a former president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter. I'm Martin Sheen. I may not be a real-life President, but there are three things I've learned about real-life politics. First: What's happening right now in America is not normal. The rhetoric coming from Washington is hateful and in opposition to the values of inclusion and equality America was built on. Second: To protect the principles we care so deeply about from the extremely partisan atmosphere -- like access to health care, a secure retirement, or investments in education or infrastructure -- we need to keep good lawmakers in place. **Senator Sherrod Brown is one of those lawmakers.** He doesn't just talk about progressive values; he embodies them. He fights for them. He's an authentic leader. Third: **We need to step up.** Never doubt that a group of concerned citizens, however small, can make a big difference. [**Peter, I'm asking you to help Sherrod. His FEC deadline is in 3 days, and he needs to reach $655,000. Can you give $5, $10, or more to help him reach that goal?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe05/4462dc26/7b757a64/201ab97b/2637934177/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0bXMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924ms?refcode=sbe180924ms_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe05/4462dc26/7b757a64/201ab97a/2637934177/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0bXMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924ms?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180924ms_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe05/4462dc26/7b757a64/201ab97a/2637934177/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0bXMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924ms?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180924ms_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe05/4462dc26/7b757a64/201ab97a/2637934177/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0bXMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924ms?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180924ms_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe05/4462dc26/7b757a64/201ab97b/2637934177/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0bXMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924ms?refcode=sbe180924ms_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** I've played a lot of roles in my career. A Captain in the Vietnam War. The uncle of a young superhero. A liberal U.S. President battling an opposition Congress. But in real life, I'm a guy from Ohio. I was born in Dayton. My mom was an Irish immigrant and my dad was a factory worker and machine inspector. **Sherrod is one of those rare lawmakers that lives up to the trust we place in him as an elected official.** He puts Ohio families first, last, and always. That's the guy I want representing my family in the Senate. [**Sherrod is facing tough resistance from right-wing special interest groups -- the Koch network plans to spend $400 million on the midterm elections. President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence threw their support behind Sherrod's opponent. If you can, chip in to help Sherrod hit his goal right now.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe05/4462dc26/7b757a64/201ab97b/2637934177/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0bXMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924ms?refcode=sbe180924ms_m_other&refcode2=3268183") All the best, and thanks for helping Sherrod. Martin

name: Casey Campaign HQ
subject: there's always another battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e625f/51dbcc2a/13911f14/3abfffd/3796599130/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team --

There are always new battles to fight under this administration. We've fought against a president who tried to strip affordable health care from millions of Americans. We've seen courts strike down workers' rights to organize. We've witnessed Congressional Republicans push through a tax bill that benefitted the top 1% at the expense of middle-class Americans. And now, Republicans are fighting to expand their slim majority in Congress.

**We can't afford to let Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat turn red this year. Can you help send Bob back to the Senate to fight for all Pennsylvanians?**

Here's the link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/deadline](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180927_fr1_nd_PA&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks.

P.S.: We have a big Weekend of Action coming up, and could use your help knocking doors, calling voters and getting out the vote. Sign up for a shift on **_[Saturday](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e625f/51dbcc2a/13911f14/3abffff/3796599130/VEsF/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/padems/?date=2018-09-29T04%3A00%3A00.000Z")_** or **_[Sunday](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e625f/51dbcc2a/13911f14/3abfff8/3796599130/VEsC/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/padems/?date=2018-09-30T04%3A00%3A00.000Z")_**. Thanks!

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180927_fr1_nd_PA&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Team Scholten Alert
subject: Peter, “... we’ve crushed it. Until now.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
The support we’ve received since launching this campaign has been incredible. Despite not accepting any corporate PAC money, we’ve managed to outraise Steve King three quarters in a row, powered by grassroots contributions _from over 15,000 individual donors!_
You’ve especially been generous at the end of each fundraising quarter. Below are some of the images we’ve used in the past to track these goals:
Each time we’ve set a quarterly goal, we’ve not only met it—we’ve crushed it. **Until now. This is the final quarterly report before Election Day, and we’re not even halfway to our $100,000 online goal with only 4 days to go! [_Please help us reach this crucial goal with a contribution today!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2361426/13046930/-366429704?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGIwZmY4Ni04Y2MyLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AdcyJegq_2JTrVod6Uhh46Vsncsolkghl7Fs4B1dtBU=)**
As we’ve stated before, these goals aren’t random numbers we pull out of thin air, **these are the metrics we need to hit if we’re going to continue the kind of campaign it’s going to take to beat Steve King.**
J.D. is literally living out of the campaign RV because he's spending so much time on the trail meeting as many people as possible. He’s working this hard because we have only 40 days we have left until Election Day and we have a real path to victory. **This is the best chance we’ve ever had to defeat Steve King, but it won’t happen unless we’re all in.[_Say you have J.D.’s back with a contribution today, and together, we can send J.D. to Washington where he can truly “Stand Tall for All!”_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2361427/13046931/-366429704?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGIwZmY4Ni04Y2MyLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AdcyJegq_2JTrVod6Uhh46Vsncsolkghl7Fs4B1dtBU=)**
Thank you,
Team Scholten

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: our FEC report...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter,

Our Congress is broken, and the Republicans in power are
doing nothing to fix it. In 40 days, we’ll have the chance to
elect a wave of Democrats and I am committed to leading the
charge on systemic fixes to get Congress working again.

At midnight on Sunday we close our books on the final
quarterly Federal Election Commission (FEC) report of the midterm
elections. Every dollar counts now more than ever.

Our goal is to raise $10,000 before midnight Sunday to show
that Democrats are ready for sweeping change, and are putting
serious grassroots power behind it. Click here to add your
contribution to our FEC report right now →

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Two heartbreaking stories & why this campaign is so important to me.
body:
** Our District needs change.
------------------------------------------------------------
Friends,

When I go out and knock on doors to talk to voters, I knock with a heavy heart. I knock with a heavy heart because behind every door is a person with a story, a family with struggles and heartbreaks. This week has been particularly strong for me, as I have heard two stories that touched my heart.

Earlier this week a farmer reached out to me to talk about how suicide has hit her community and taken someone she knew. She reached out because she knows that our farmers need better, they need a system that does not let anyone fall through the cracks.

I also heard the story of a mother who is struggling to survive on Medicare & Social Security. When copays are too high and cost of living adjustments come too late people are constantly left behind.

This campaign means so much to me because I know that I am not alone in my experience. This campaign is a responsibility that I take seriously because I know there are so many people who need a change, and they need a real change. It is one of the reasons why I support single-payer healthcare because it is the only way to guarantee that no one is left behind.

Thank you so much for supporting me in this campaign, and know that I refuse to allow anyone to be left behind.

Sincerely,

Ian A. Todd

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Need your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This is it -- On Sunday, I will face the most critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of my Senate reelection campaign yet.

**This is the final quarterly deadline before the election, and my first head-to-head against Libertarian Gary Johnson.** This could not be more critical. Read more below on why this is a make-or-break moment for the rest of my campaign. Or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our final quarterly FEC fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Help+me+reach+our+final+quarterly+FEC+fu&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180927_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180927_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180927_2_3")_**

* * *

Just over a month ago, my Senate race was flipped on its head when Libertarian Gary Johnson announced that he was challenging me for the Senate.

Since then, I've been amazed by the outpouring of support as we brace for the attacks we know are coming from Johnson and national Libertarian super PACs. Now, we're facing our first real fundraising test since Johnson entered the race.

**Sunday is the last quarterly FEC deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the first time since Johnson challenged me. With Johnson giving six-figures to his own campaign, we can 't afford a weak showing.**

**[DONATE $29 NOW>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180927_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180927_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180927_2_3")**
I already had a target on my back before Johnson entered the race. I've worked hard in the Senate to protect health care, public lands, and workers' rights -- which is why the Koch brothers launched ads against me earlier this year.

**Simply put: the stakes have never been higher for me.** That's why my team and I are focusing on more grassroots organizing and expanding our ad spending to reach as many voters as possible.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To expand our campaign in the final weeks before voting begins, our new budget goal is to raise an additional $75,000 before our Sunday deadline. This is my first Senate reelection race, and all our hard work and more will be undone if Johnson or my extreme Republican opponent defeats me in November. Will you pitch in now and help us close our budget gap before we publically report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q3?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180927_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180927_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180927_2_3")_**

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Ending ‘the war against business’
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 27, 2018
## Ending ‘the war against business’
##
**Today, senior Trump Administration officials** hosted a White House Economic Summit for an audience of America’s small business owners. A lot has changed under President Donald J. Trump’s economic policies, and today’s summit offered an important reminder of the positive effects those policies have had on America’s job creators. **The U.S. economy is booming** and confidence is soaring. Between the President’s strong regulatory reform agenda, the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, and investment in America’s workforce, a sluggish economy has been revived. In fact, according to CNBC, 54 percent of Americans now rate the economy as good or excellent—the highest ever recorded. **Small business optimism is on the rise as well** , hitting a 35-year high, according to the National Federation of Independent Business. And the confidence job creators have in this economy has translated into higher pay for America’s workers. In the past year, U.S. workers saw the largest pay increase in nearly a decade, the Bureau of Economic Analysis reports. **With the economy booming** and America open for business, the evidence is clear: President Trump’s policies will continue to drive true American prosperity. “We have had better growth, we have had tremendous job creation, lower unemployment across the board,” Director of the National Economic Council Larry Kudlow said today. [**Watch Larry Kudlow: President Trump will “end the war against business”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDc2NDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ3NjQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNzkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1045374321085091842)
## Building a better world for female entrepreneurs
##
**While in New York** for the 73rd Session of the United Nations General Assembly (UNGA), Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump took some time to focus on a message central to her work in the White House: economic empowerment for women across the globe. **“We know that investing in women** is a priority in terms of our global security, in terms global prosperity, in terms of global peace. We also know that women around the world are one of the greatest under-tapped resources. When you invest in women, they invest back into their communities, they can invest back into their families, they invest in things that have a generational impact on their societies,” Ms. Trump said. **“At #UNGA 2018** , I had the honor of joining @WorldBank @JimYongKim, @ConcordiaSummit + global leaders for impactful discussions on #WomensEconomicEmpowerment in furtherance of @POTUS’s National Security Strategy, as we strive for peace, prosperity & stability at home & abroad,” she tweeted. [**Watch Ivanka Trump talk women's economic empowerment at UNGA 2018**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDc2NDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ3NjQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNzkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vC8kTZGv_ug) **More** : [**President Trump returns to the U.N.—with a pile of diplomatic successes**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDc2NDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ3NjQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNzkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-trump-returns-u-n-mountain-evidence-peace-strength/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDc2NDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ3NjQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNzkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDc2NDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ3NjQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNzkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI3Ljk1NDc2NDAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNy45NTQ3NjQwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkxNzkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
