name: Mel Hall
subject: Do you have a pre-existing condition?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend,

The issue I hear about most on the campaign is health care, because far too many hardworking Hoosiers are in danger of losing coverage if Congress eliminates protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

**If you or anyone in your family is living with a pre-existing condition, and are worried about losing health care coverage, I want to hear from you.**

[_**Please take a moment to share your story with me now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/2smYFG4NsWNKpng5Whmem-4PGrePcauIa9UfUCRrcis=/72jLCsAj1LqRXxKeOIgPlCdQObxXgRQfqzsrdOTUV7Q=)

Hoosiers simply can't afford a representative in Congress who puts corporate interests ahead of working families -- there's just too much at stake. I'll fight every day to protect coverage for people with pre-existing conditions and ensure everyone can afford the health care they need.

[_**Are you living with a pre-existing condition? Share your story now to help us demonstrate what 's at stake this November.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/2smYFG4NsWNKpng5Whmem-4PGrePcauIa9UfUCRrcis=/72jLCsAj1LqRXxKeOIgPlCdQObxXgRQfqzsrdOTUV7Q=)

I look forward to hearing from you,

Mel Hall

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress

South Bend, IN 46624 United States

subject: my friend Tom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Arizonans are fortunate to have a fighter like Tom O'Halleran serving them in Congress. He needs our support today.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ee4/1a8421e1/1a5c20435/49254024/3033503753/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

Friend, _Arizonans are fortunate to have a fighter like Tom O 'Halleran serving them in Congress._ When Tom served in Arizona's state legislature, I watched him fight for all-day kindergarten and work to reform child protective services. And since his election to Congress, I've watched Tom do right for Arizona's working families in Washington, standing up for their health care and serving his district's rural and urban communities with distinction. But Tom needs [**our support today**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b1_rb_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") so he can continue looking out for Arizona families in Congress. He is up for re-election in November and his swing district is very competitive. [**Friend, will you make a donation to Tom 's campaign today, before his next fundraising deadline on Sunday?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b1_rb_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Independent, pragmatic voices like Tom are too rare in Washington, friend. Tom doesn't get pushed around by party politics; he does what's right for families in his district, and he'll work with anyone to do it. It's one of the things I most admire about him -- **and it 's why it's critical that Tom not lose re-election to an extreme partisan who would be a rubber-stamp for the far-right.** I'm confident that Arizona voters will re-elect Tom in November if he can share his record of accomplishments with them. [**So, please consider donating to Tom 's campaign before his deadline, if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b1_rb_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you, Ron Barber _Former Congressman, Arizona 's 2nd District_ | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b1_rb_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

clean_body: Arizonans are fortunate to have a fighter like Tom O'Halleran serving them in Congress. He needs our support today. Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first. "" Friend, Arizonans are fortunate to have a fighter like Tom O 'Halleran serving them in Congress. When Tom served in Arizona's state legislature, I watched him fight for all-day kindergarten and work to reform child protective services. And since his election to Congress, I've watched Tom do right for Arizona's working families in Washington, standing up for their health care and serving his district's rural and urban communities with distinction. But Tom needs "=" so he can continue looking out for Arizona families in Congress. He is up for re-election in November and his swing district is very competitive. "=" Independent, pragmatic voices like Tom are too rare in Washington, friend. Tom doesn't get pushed around by party politics; he does what's right for families in his district, and he'll work with anyone to do it. It's one of the things I most admire about him -- and it 's why it's critical that Tom not lose re-election to an extreme partisan who would be a rubber-stamp for the far-right. I'm confident that Arizona voters will re-elect Tom in November if he can share his record of accomplishments with them. "=" Thank you, Ron Barber Former Congressman, Arizona 's 2nd District | ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "="._ ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: Dana Bye
subject: Who is the group behind these attacks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Today, the Congressional Leadership Fund, Speaker Paul Ryan's Super PAC, launched yet another blatantly false attack ad against Abigail. I want to offer some important context about the group behind these misleading attacks.
| | Peter,
Today, the Congressional Leadership Fund, Speaker Paul Ryan's Super PAC, launched yet another blatantly false attack ad against Abigail. This one both smears her personal integrity and distorts her stances on the issues.
By now, you may have seen this Super PAC's first negative ad on television, and this news means that you will likely continue hearing from them in the coming weeks. **So I want to offer some important context about the group behind these misleading attacks.**
* **This Super PAC -- often known as "CLF" \-- is the main outside group tasked with saving the Republicans' House majority,** and they have millions of dollars to spend on toss-up races like ours. _A single donor gave this group $30 million._

* **Republican incumbents, including Rep. Dave Brat, are counting on CLF to save their re-election campaigns** with negative ads against their opponents. As a Super PAC, CLF can spend an unlimited amount on each race.

* **CLF 's ads are not accurate, but they do not care.** _The Washington Post_ recently published a fact-check of several ads CLF has run against Democratic candidates. The _Post_ awarded CLF "Four Pinocchios" because their attacks were so "grossly misleading."

Thanks to [**your continued support,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ma0xjdcNzvawFyyRXcpO26Vh9bXhIpihSO-lqz5s7Mg=/Zsni-gN7b3wyeA_oovpytpORbOZI9ARFcP_tH42UXOc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) we have had the resources to respond, and we have continued to gain strength in the face of these attacks, as evidenced by a new poll this week showing Abigail tied with Rep. Brat.

But this Super PAC won't be standing down -- if anything, they will double down as Abigail's support grows. **[Will you make a donation to Team Spanberger today, so we can continue to set the record straight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ma0xjdcNzvawFyyRXcpO26Vh9bXhIpihSO-lqz5s7Mg=/Zsni-gN7b3wyeA_oovpytpORbOZI9ARFcP_tH42UXOc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)**

Thanks,

Dana Bye
_Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ma0xjdcNzvawFyyRXcpO26Vh9bXhIpihSO-lqz5s7Mg=/Zsni-gN7b3wyeA_oovpytpORbOZI9ARFcP_tH42UXOc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.27_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ma0xjdcNzvawFyyRXcpO26Vh9bXhIpihSO-lqz5s7Mg=/Zsni-gN7b3wyeA_oovpytpORbOZI9ARFcP_tH42UXOc=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ma0xjdcNzvawFyyRXcpO26Vh9bXhIpihSO-lqz5s7Mg=/4J_eFiink6n9uqqdPl2NBf0OfIAScZg3hUAUfw3WVHc=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ma0xjdcNzvawFyyRXcpO26Vh9bXhIpihSO-lqz5s7Mg=/Xk9biHzuIWia5_Zx4dRE4t--qV9SP5Xz8HchgW344eQ=).

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Quick update from the trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | I wanted to share a quick update from the trail as we begin to close out the month of September and head into the final stretch of our campaign. Here on Team Kathy, we've been doing what we can to help the people hardest hit by Hurricane Florence. Volunteers helped collect donations of food and supplies for those in need. | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f96/3682556426/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180927ld?refcode=kme180927ld_m&recurring=true")
---
Thousands of families are beginning the slow, painful process of picking up the pieces in the aftermath of the storm. [**If you'd like to see how you can help, check here to see how you can pitch in for those communities in need.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f95/3682556426/VEsE/ "https://www.wxii12.com/article/heres-how-to-help-hurricane-florence-victims/23208513")
With only weeks left until Election Day, we've resumed our busy schedule of getting out into the community, talking to voters, and making sure everyone knows what this campaign is about.
Our campaign hosted and attended a number of events this past week, including a town hall with workers and celebrated National Voter Registration Day with our grassroots organizing team.
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f96/3682556426/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180927ld?refcode=kme180927ld_m&recurring=true") | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f96/3682556426/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180927ld?refcode=kme180927ld_m&recurring=true")
---|---
Everywhere I go in the district, people raise the same concerns: how can we make health care affordable, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and protect Medicare & Social Security? From Statesville to Greensboro to Lexington, people across this district are ready for change. They want a leader who will stand up for them in Washington, not special interests.
Some of my other favorite events this month? After attending the Iredell County Agricultural Fair, I joined the Iredell County Democratic Women for a delicious potluck in Statesville. I also had a blast attending the North Carolina Folk Festival in Greensboro, where I met hundreds of voters from across our region, ate incredible food, and listened to great music.
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f96/3682556426/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180927ld?refcode=kme180927ld_m&recurring=true") | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f96/3682556426/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180927ld?refcode=kme180927ld_m&recurring=true")
---|---
At every event, I continue to be grateful for folks across the district who are so willing to share their stories with me. Our campaign is powered by people, whether it's volunteering their time or sharing their experiences with us, and I wouldn't run this campaign in any other way.
I want to hear from you, too. [**Tell me what issues are worrying you and your family.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f94/3682556426/VEsB/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180927ld")
And finally, I wanted to give you a quick update of where the race stands today:
| Race Rating: **TOSS-UP** | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f96/3682556426/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180927ld?refcode=kme180927ld_m&recurring=true")
---
Thanks to all of your hard work, this race is now officially a Toss-Up. We've caught Rep. Ted Budd -- now all we have to do is keep the momentum with us all the way through Election Day.
And with your help, I know we can do that.
Thanks for all of your help and support this month. Let's keep it going!
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f9b/3682556426/VEsP/ "https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe") [www.kathymanning2018.com](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542794c/e3b7d3/5d32e7ce/25554f9a/3682556426/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.kathymanning2018.com/")

name: Team Sisolak
subject: re: Steve's note
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Zw62Myr-LfyIsGt69lRYUkNx9Oe4iYigWbO4q5IcJV4=/IwLyvP4F-wCO0SekBygRK__loPtTB98QXrS7cyMHylg=?gpsid=37_57_3931&refcode=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_LG_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_LG_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)
---
Hey there --

Have you seen Steve's new ad about protecting Medicaid?

**Governor Sandoval did the right thing when he expanded health care for Nevadans in need, but only one candidate in this race will protect it: Steve Sisolak.**

**[That's why it's so important for our supporters to chip in before Sunday's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline: We need to make sure the truth doesn't get drowned out by the special interests. Will you contribute $5 or more now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Zw62Myr-LfyIsGt69lRYUkNx9Oe4iYigWbO4q5IcJV4=/IwLyvP4F-wCO0SekBygRK__loPtTB98QXrS7cyMHylg=?gpsid=37_57_3931&refcode=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)**

Right now, we still need to raise $27,000 before Sunday at midnight to hit our ambitious fundraising goal. And falling short isn't an option.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Zw62Myr-LfyIsGt69lRYUkNx9Oe4iYigWbO4q5IcJV4=/IwLyvP4F-wCO0SekBygRK__loPtTB98QXrS7cyMHylg=?gpsid=37_57_3931&refcode=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_IG_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_IG_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)
The special interests behind Laxalt are powerful, but together, we can stand up to them and build a brighter future for Nevada.

Thanks,

Team Sisolak

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Zw62Myr-LfyIsGt69lRYUkNx9Oe4iYigWbO4q5IcJV4=/IwLyvP4F-wCO0SekBygRK__loPtTB98QXrS7cyMHylg=?gpsid=37_57_3931&refcode=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_B1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_B1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Steve Sisolak <info@stevesisolak.com>
Date: Thursday, September27, 2018
Subject: 200,000 Nevadans
Friend,

When Governor Sandoval did the right thing and voted to expand Medicaid, 200,000 Nevadans got health care, and could finally go to the doctor. But Adam Laxalt opposed Sandoval -- and opposed expanding Medicaid.

Special interests are hiding the truth and trying to make Laxalt's record on health care something it's not. That's why I'm launching a new TV ad today to set the record straight.

**[Nevada's next governor should make health care more -- not less -- affordable. And that's exactly what I'll do if I'm elected. Please watch our new ad that shares this message, then chip in $5 to help buy TV spots before our end-of-quarter deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Zw62Myr-LfyIsGt69lRYUkNx9Oe4iYigWbO4q5IcJV4=/IwLyvP4F-wCO0SekBygRK__loPtTB98QXrS7cyMHylg=?gpsid=37_57_3931&refcode=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Zw62Myr-LfyIsGt69lRYUkNx9Oe4iYigWbO4q5IcJV4=/IwLyvP4F-wCO0SekBygRK__loPtTB98QXrS7cyMHylg=?gpsid=37_57_3931&refcode=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_IG2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_IG2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)
[WATCH THE AD](https://act.myngp.com/el/Zw62Myr-LfyIsGt69lRYUkNx9Oe4iYigWbO4q5IcJV4=/IwLyvP4F-wCO0SekBygRK__loPtTB98QXrS7cyMHylg=?gpsid=37_57_3931&refcode=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_B2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180927_EOQ5kr_B2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)
Our _final_ end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is just a few days away. We can't afford to fall short -- missing our goal will mean that we can't tell the truth about Laxalt's record on health care.

We're really up against it with all the support Laxalt's getting from dark money donors, but support from Nevadans like you have kept us in this race despite their misleading ads.

**[Please chip in whatever you can afford before this critical deadline on Sunday. subject: We're running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
| | |
---
Friend--
Election Day is just weeks away, and now is the time to elect Elaine Luria to serve Virginia's 2nd Congressional District. She's a retired naval officer who'll fight to protect our rights and stop a Trump rubber stamp from taking them away.
I lived, practiced medicine, and represented Tidewater. I know Elaine will serve the Hampton Roads region well in Congress. Elaine and I see eye-to-eye on issues that have brought the commonwealth together: Ensuring we have affordable healthcare for all Virginians, creating good jobs, protecting our seniors, and fighting to ensure women have the right to choose.
Recent polling shows Elaine is ahead and can win in November, so she needs our help NOW. But Elaine's short on cash and needs $10,000 by midnight to keep her ads on the air. **[Can I count on you to give $5 this moment to elect Elaine and flip this seat BLUE?](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f2151/39260142/447ce536/626347f9/1467903451/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoidHdhNGVsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGszMDYtYnUtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/twa4el?refcode=jtk306-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Elaine's trying to unseat an extremist incumbent, Scott Taylor, who The Washington Post called a "vulnerable" House Republican.
Taylor's ideas are simply wrongheaded for Virginia: He wants to strip millions of people of their lifesaving health coverage and stop commonsense gun violence prevention measures like universal background checks. Sometimes, when you can't change people's minds, you have to change their seats. And it's time for a change in the 2nd Congressional District. **Virginia can 't afford to go backward--we need to ensure we elect Elaine and pave the way ahead NOW.**
**Time's running out, and we 're just $2,743 short of sending Elaine $10,000 before midnight. I know I can count on you to send the resources Elaine needs to win this election: Will you donate $5 this moment to defeat a Trump supporter and elect a hardworking former Navy officer who'll fight for all Virginians?**

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: The truth about Tammy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
The American heroes who serve in our armed forces put themselves in the path of the greatest dangers known to man – dangers which we can’t even.....

Friend,

The American heroes who serve in our armed forces put themselves in the path of the greatest dangers known to man – dangers which we can’t even imagine.

These brave men and women trade the security of American life for the horrors of war, many making the ultimate sacrifice.

We all owe our veterans an incredible debt of gratitude, and much, much more.

One person who didn’t get that message? Tammy Baldwin.

Tammy Baldwin knew about the opioid crisis at the Tomah VA, but she did nothing.

She offered taxpayer money in exchange for silence and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to cover it all up.

[STOP TAMMY BALDWIN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e652e986ca534678bdde2f62b7ea149d&_e=4-0RWDHf0N7XA3Ver6V8jQjcJ1C-K60AldxLWHEiiTAzpgZuZE8DVGMefoXMEw6D5iOl6PxVBf3Zmc40ISzCHa42tZB98infjKm9xgggoa89ZXDbh7JDaqvLoWFSR_f_6IaUJzTHMGcKW1uqJU0Nwa9A9xwX6ZeTnCMQ2GYgcXjV-520e3mN2ry2S9dfMCZahw4c5jq601HI6SNUmptTbmdg9ArcuWHyrVYIv-9zZQjKjqvAgIxV9A_2IANHK1ukjP8bpKo4XTOnTRXnzODyUhXhZyM5u0aD-h62wNh5nOK-fXJs2_xunHUJNnPvmL7og4lAojL4G5egrIne8eajc2Rhph__PJTZN0i2rpAx0IYhMyoMv7RUeg3I5u-HC6EQYJVfdRyJ7Kk0eLtp4l_Wc4PJFqSzCXCIdq1SOx4tgVI%3D)
---

I’ve spent my life helping patients. I’ve seen the many health challenges faced by the veterans Tammy Baldwin discarded.

Baldwin has spent hers playing politics.

Wisconsin, it’s time to come together in support of our most basic values. We all know that American vets deserve the best care possible. We know that it’s right to thank them for their service and honor them for the sacrifices they made.

We know that Tammy Baldwin failed them.

Friend, The American heroes who serve in our armed forces put themselves in the path of the greatest dangers known to man – dangers which we can’t even imagine. These brave men and women trade the security of American life for the horrors of war, many making the ultimate sacrifice. We all owe our veterans an incredible debt of gratitude, and much, much more. One person who didn’t get that message? Tammy Baldwin. Tammy Baldwin knew about the opioid crisis at the Tomah VA, but she did nothing. She offered taxpayer money in exchange for silence and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to cover it all up. I’ve spent my life helping patients. I’ve seen the many health challenges faced by the veterans Tammy Baldwin discarded. Baldwin has spent hers playing politics. Wisconsin, it’s time to come together in support of our most basic values. We all know that American vets deserve the best care possible. We know that it’s right to thank them for their service and honor them for the sacrifices they made. We know that Tammy Baldwin failed them. It’s time to Our veterans deserve the best. Tammy Baldwin could not be farther from that. -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate
